name: The Easter Rabbit
description:
SFW intro

Whilst wandering in lands far from seen, a kindred soul can be quite mean, yet myth or not this rabbit hops, for those who seen it aren't quite the truth believer. So sit tight and lean your chairs, for remember that tall men tell tall tales.

Credits to Aisbergdumb 🧊 on twitter for the art

Any ideas? Leave below!
creator: Lenoxer
